images.label: Task 2 cover image
images.description: An open cardboard box, a black book, and a folded note are shown separately on a plain background, introducing the key objects in the story.

images.label: Task 2 Scene 1
images.description: A closed cardboard box appears on a gray background with large red question marks around it, creating a feeling of mystery and curiosity.

images.label: Task 2 Scene 2
images.description: A young woman looks nervous and bites her nails against a dark background, showing worry, hesitation, and unease.

images.label: Task 2 Scene 3
images.description: A sign with a question mark is placed above a round table, emphasizing the clue connected to table 7 and the hidden object beneath it.

images.label: Task 2 Scene 4
images.description: Inside a cafe, a man sits at a table drinking coffee while Anna stands farther away near another table with the mysterious package, suggesting observation and suspense.

images.label: Task 2 Scene 5
images.description: A sunny city street scene shows Anna walking toward a cafe called A Sunlight Cafe, matching the calm beginning of the story.

images.label: Task 2 Scene 6
images.description: Anna is connected with the mysterious package and the cafe setting, suggesting that she is trying to decide what to do next in a confusing situation.
